circuitsPage.title: Our private Morocco tours
circuitsPage.subtitle: From the Merzouga desert to the imperial cities and blue Chefchaouen: {count} private itineraries with your own driver
circuitsPage.ctaText: Can't find the perfect itinerary? We design fully personalised trips around your dates, wishes and budget. Free quote within 24 h.

home.title: Authentic Morocco Tours — Private & Tailor-Made Trips
home.description: Private tours in Morocco with English-speaking drivers: Merzouga desert, imperial cities, Chefchaouen. 100% tailor-made trips, free quote within 24 h.

circuits.title: Morocco Tours — Sahara Desert, Imperial Cities & Tailor-Made
circuits.description: Discover all our private Morocco tours: Merzouga desert, imperial cities (Fes, Marrakech, Chefchaouen), departures from Casablanca, Tangier, Rabat, Agadir. Free quote.

destinations.title: Morocco Destinations — Sahara, Imperial Cities, Atlantic Coast
destinations.description: Discover Morocco's most beautiful destinations: Merzouga desert, Marrakech, Chefchaouen, Fes, Ait Ben Haddou, Essaouira. Private tailor-made tours to every destination.

contact.title: Contact & Quote — Tailor-Made Trips to Morocco
contact.description: Contact Authentic Morocco Tours for a free quote within 24 h: private tours, desert, imperial cities, day trips. Marrakech-based agency, fast reply in English.

about.title: About Us — Your Travel Agency in Morocco
about.description: Authentic Morocco Tours: licensed Moroccan operator, over 10 years of experience, private tailor-made tours with English-speaking drivers across Morocco.

reviews.title: Customer Reviews — They Travelled With Us
reviews.description: Read reviews from our travellers: desert tours, imperial cities, day trips. Over 500 travellers guided across Morocco, 5/5 average rating.

faq.title: FAQ — Frequently Asked Questions About Our Morocco Trips
faq.description: All the answers to your questions: booking, deposit, cancellation, private tours, desert, accommodation, best time to visit Morocco.

blog.title: Blog — Morocco Travel Tips and Stories
blog.description: Practical tips, itineraries and stories to plan your trip to Morocco: Merzouga desert, Marrakech, imperial cities, best seasons and local advice.

legalNotice.title: Legal Notice
legalNotice.description: Legal notice of the Authentic Morocco Tours website: publisher, hosting, intellectual property, personal data.

agency.bio: Authentic Morocco Tours is a licensed Moroccan tour operator specialising in private, tailor-made tours across the Kingdom. For over 10 years, we have guided travellers from all over the world through a deeper Morocco, far from standardised itineraries.
agency.approach: Our philosophy: offering you a true experience, at your own pace, with the best addresses, the most genuine encounters and attentive service from the first day to the last.
agency.description: Private tours, passionate local guides, charming accommodation and authentic experiences. Morocco tailor-made, at your own pace.
agency.pricingNote: All our services are quoted individually and tailor-made, depending on your programme, the number of participants and your departure point. A deposit is required to confirm the booking. Contact us for a personalised quote.

homePage.heroImageAlt: Alleyway in the Marrakech medina leading to the Koutoubia

merzouga.title: Marrakech – Merzouga
merzouga.desc: A desert escape, a night in a charming camp and breathtaking scenery.

grandTour.title: Grand Tour of Morocco
grandTour.desc: Imperial cities, the Sahara, the Atlas mountains and Atlantic coasts.

chefchaouen.title: Marrakech – Chefchaouen
chefchaouen.desc: Cultural immersion and the pearls of northern Morocco.

chefchaouen.label: Chefchaouen
chefchaouen.sub: The blue pearl of the Rif

homePage.bannerTitle: Experience the magic of a night under the Sahara stars
homePage.bannerText: A charming camp in the heart of the dunes, a Berber dinner by the fire and the endless silence of Erg Chebbi. An experience you will never forget.
homePage.socialSub: Join our community and discover our tours, favourite spots and behind-the-scenes of your future trips.
homePage.contactSub: Free personalised quote — we reply to every message within 24 h.

excursionTemplate.bookText: Tailor-made programme, free quote within 24 h. English-speaking driver available year-round.

destinationTemplate.mustSeeSub: The sites and monuments to discover with your local guide.
destinationTemplate.photosSub: A few moments captured during private guided visits in {name}.
destinationTemplate.ctaText: Tailor-made programme, transport included, local guide. Free quote within 24 h.

destinationsPage.eyebrow: Where do you want to go?
destinationsPage.heroText: From the Sahara to the imperial cities, from the Atlas to the Atlantic: every destination can be visited on a private tour, at your own pace.
destinationsPage.citiesText: Click on your departure city to discover in one click all the tours and day trips leaving from it.
destinationsPage.gridText: Sahara, imperial cities, Atlantic coast: the must-see places our tours take you to discover.
destinationsPage.ctaTitle: We create the itinerary that suits you

desert-sahara-merzouga.name: Sahara Desert
desert-sahara-merzouga.desc: Golden dunes as far as the eye can see, nights in a camp under the stars and an unforgettable sunrise on camelback.

marrakech.name: Marrakech
marrakech.desc: Jemaa el-Fna, colourful souks, palaces and gardens: the most vibrant imperial city in the Kingdom.

chefchaouen.name: Chefchaouen
chefchaouen.sub: The blue pearl of the Rif
chefchaouen.desc: Azure alleyways, Rif mountains and a gentle pace of life: Morocco's most photogenic town.

ait-ben-haddou.name: Ait Ben Haddou
ait-ben-haddou.desc: The most famous ksar in southern Morocco, a legendary film set at the gates of the desert.

fes.name: Fes
fes.desc: The world's oldest medina, its centuries-old tanneries and exceptional craftsmanship.

essaouira.name: Essaouira
essaouira.desc: A blue fishing port, ramparts facing the ocean and a UNESCO-listed bohemian medina.

casablanca.name: Casablanca
casablanca.desc: The Hassan II Mosque, a masterpiece set on the Atlantic, and the lively corniche.

vallees-atlas.name: Atlas Valleys
vallees-atlas.desc: Spectacular waterfalls, Berber villages and snow-capped peaks an hour from Marrakech.

tanger.name: Tangier & the North
tanger.desc: The gateway to Africa, its legendary cafés and the bay where the Mediterranean meets the Atlantic.

contactPage.title: Get a free quote
contactPage.heroText: Tell us about your trip and our team will reply within 24 hours with a tailor-made programme and a personalised quote.

private.title: 100% private trips
private.description: All our tours are strictly private: you travel only with your loved ones, without sharing your vehicle or itinerary with other groups.

authentic.title: Local authenticity
authentic.detail: At the heart of the real Morocco
authentic.description: Characterful accommodation, encounters with Berber families, local gastronomy: we favour experiences off the beaten tourist track.

languages.title: Service in 4 languages
languages.description: Our team assists you in French, English, Spanish and Italian. Professional drivers and certified official guides available year-round.

flexible.title: Total flexibility
flexible.description: Every itinerary can be adjusted to your pace, wishes and budget. No fixed programme: we design your trip around your expectations.

aboutPage.ctaTitle: Ready to discover Morocco with us?

reviewsPage.title: What our clients say
reviewsPage.ctaTitle: Ready to live your own Moroccan adventure?
reviewsPage.ctaText: Join our satisfied clients and create your own unforgettable memories.

faqPage.title: Frequently asked questions
faqPage.heroText: Everything you need to know before booking your Morocco tour with Authentic Morocco Tours.
faqPage.ctaText: Contact us directly. We reply to every message within 24 hours.
